display.purpose: Hero headline only. Outfit 700, violet glow text-shadow.

section-title.purpose: Section anchors. Plus Jakarta Sans 700. Fixed 42px.

heading.purpose: Card titles, nav brand, article h2/h3. Outfit 600.

body.purpose: All paragraph text. Inter 400 with Chinese fallback stack.

shadows.name: fab-glow
shadows.purpose: Scroll-to-top FAB only. The single shadow in the entire system.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for state transitions: hover backgrounds, text color changes.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Hover transitions on nav items, cards, chips.

motion.name: duration-card
motion.purpose: Card hover transitions: background and border opacity shifts.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gradient violet CTA. Rare; used on hero entry cards and knowledge center tabs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed 0%, #6d28d9 100%); color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 24px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6d28d9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c4b5fd; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Nav Button
components.description: Navigation bar link button. The default interactive element in the top nav.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg class="ds-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18"/><path d="M9 21V9"/></svg>知识中心</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #a1a1aa; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #ffffff; } .ds-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Accent Chip
components.description: Hero eyebrow and section indicator badge. Semi-transparent violet pill.
components.html: AI 助手新时代
components.css: .ds-chip-accent { background: rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.2); color: #c4b5fd; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Standard content card. Dark glass surface that lifts on hover via luminosity shift.
components.html:
🐧腾讯

QClaw（微信直连版）

微信扫码直接启用，无需复杂安装，适合普通用户快速体验
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; transition: background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-card:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-vendor { font-size: 14px; color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Outfit, Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #71717a; margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation with backdrop blur. The only blurred element in the system.
components.html: Openclaw
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: Outfit, Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 4px; }

components.name: Tab Button
components.description: Knowledge center category tab. Active state uses gradient; inactive is ghost.
components.css: .ds-tab-group { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; padding: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 12px; } .ds-tab { padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: transparent; color: #a1a1aa; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-tab:hover { color: #ffffff; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } .ds-tab-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed 0%, #6d28d9 100%); color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.3); } .ds-tab-active:hover { background: #6d28d9; }

components.name: FAB Scroll-to-Top
components.description: Floating action button for scroll-to-top. The only element with a real shadow and scale animation.
components.html: <button class="ds-fab"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 19V5"/><path d="M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-fab { position: fixed; bottom: 32px; right: 32px; z-index: 50; width: 48px; height: 48px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed 0%, #6d28d9 100%); color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.3); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-fab:hover { transform: scale(1.1); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.4); } .ds-fab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c4b5fd; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Section Title Block
components.description: Section heading pair: Plus Jakarta Sans title + Inter description. The fixed 42px anchor.
components.html:
OpenClaw 部署客户端

阿里、腾讯、智谱、火山各家小龙虾随意选择
components.css: .ds-section-head { text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; min-height: 224px; } .ds-section-title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Outfit, sans-serif; font-size: 42px; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-section-desc { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.6; font-weight: 400; color: #999494; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A dark, type-driven design system for an AI agent onboarding tool. The aesthetic borrows from developer terminals — information-dense, monospace-adjacent rhythm, surfaces that feel like they're printed on dark glass. Nothing ornamental. Every element justifies its existence by what it communicates, not how it decorates. The system explicitly rejects 赛博朋克和霓虹灯炫技审美. No electric blues, no glowing cyan borders, no scan-line overlays. This is the calm, competent terminal of a seasoned engineer, not a Hollywood hacker screen.
keyCharacteristics: Outfit for display weight, Inter for reading comfort, Plus Jakarta Sans for section anchoring
Semi-transparent surface layers that stack without shadows
Touch feedback via luminosity shift, not scale or shadow
Information architecture biased toward comparison: tables, grids, side-by-side cards
Mobile rhythm: the same density at smaller breakpoints, no desktop-only layouts

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Terminal Violet is used on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Luminosity-Only Surface Rule
rules.body: Surfaces distinguish by luminosity shift (3% → 6% → 10% white overlay). No shadows, no borders >1px, no blur on cards. Hover is a brightness step, not movement.

rules.name: The Fixed-Anchor Rule
rules.body: Section titles are 42px fixed. They don't scale with viewport. The scroll hits the same visual weight at every boundary.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If an element needs to feel lifted, shift luminosity — don't add shadow. Shadows reserved for FAB only.

dos: Use luminosity steps (3% → 6% → 10% white overlay) to distinguish surfaces
Cap Terminal Violet at ≤15% of any screen surface
Use the fixed 42px section title as the scroll rhythm anchor
Provide touch feedback via color shift, not scale or shadow (FAB is the only exception)
Stack cards into grids that collapse cleanly to single-column on mobile
Use 1px border-white/10 as the universal separator — never a colored border accent
Run the same information density on mobile; shrink padding, not content
donts: Use 赛博朋克/霓虹灯式风格. No electric blues, no cyan borders, no scan-line effects
Use glassmorphism or blur on content surfaces. Nav blur is the only one
Use nested cards. One card per piece of information
Use modal dialogs as the first interaction pattern
Add shadows to cards. Surfaces lift via luminosity, not drop-shadow
Use the violet glow text-shadow on anything except the hero headline
Animate layout properties. Transitions target background-color, color, opacity only
Hide content behind desktop-only breakpoints. Core flows work on mobile
